summary: Iteration 12 testing complete for 5 in-progress features: Notifications, Notes CRUD, Messages (Individual/Division/Subgroup), Users Page (all fields), and Meetings->Event sync. All features working correctly. Fixed bug: super_admin role wasn't recognized as admin in AuthContext.jsx (line 52).

minor.issue: Returns 200 for nonexistent notification ID instead of 404 (idempotent behavior)
Returns {message: 'Note updated successfully'} instead of full note object
Returns 422 when conversation_id is included in body (may expect only content and message_type)

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: AuthContext.jsx line 52 - isAdmin now includes super_admin role check: (user?.roles?.includes('admin') || user?.roles?.includes('super_admin'))
Notifications API working: getAll, getUnreadCount, markAllRead, delete endpoints all functional
Notes CRUD fully functional: create note, create folder, update note, delete note, filter by folder
Messages group messaging works: Individual, Division, Subgroup conversation types all create successfully
Meetings page: Schedule Meeting dialog shows Meeting Link/ID/Password fields when Teams/Zoom selected
Events calendar shows meeting-type events in stats (4 Meetings count visible)
Users page has all 4 sections in View Details: Personal Info, Employment Info, OFO Classification, System Info
Users table shows columns: Employee, Division, Department, Position, Role, Status, Actions
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 features tested and working: 1) Notifications page has filter tabs (All, Unread, Messages, Meetings, Status, Tickets) and empty state when no notifications. 2) Notes page has CRUD with folders, tags, colors - My Notes and Shared tabs work. 3) Messages page has New Chat dialog with Individual/Division/Subgroup tabs showing users with divisions and member counts. 4) Users page (admin-only) shows table with Employee, Division, Department, Position, Role, Status columns - View Details dialog shows Personal/Employment/OFO/System Information sections. 5) Meetings page allows scheduling Teams/Zoom meetings with links, meetings appear in Events calendar. Bug fixed: super_admin role wasn't recognized as admin, fixed in AuthContext.jsx.

Notifications_Page.filter_tabs_visible: PASS - All, Unread, Messages, Meetings, Status, Tickets

Notes_Page_CRUD.create_note_dialog: PASS - Title, Content, Folder, Color, Tags
Notes_Page_CRUD.folders_sidebar: PASS - All Notes and custom folders

Messages_Page.division_tab: PASS - shows divisions with member counts
Messages_Page.subgroup_tab: PASS - shows subgroups under parent divisions

Users_Page.table_columns: PASS - Employee, Division, Department, Position, Role, Status
Users_Page.personal_information_section: PASS - Full Name, Surname, ID Number, Gender, Race, Age
Users_Page.employment_information_section: PASS - Personnel Number, Division, Department, Position, Level, Start Date, Years of Service
Users_Page.ofo_classification_section: PASS - Major Group, Sub Major Group, Occupation, OFO Code

Meetings_Event_Sync.schedule_meeting_dialog: PASS - Title, Description, Type, Start/End Time

bug_fixed.issue: super_admin users could not access admin-only pages (Users, Sponsors, etc.)
bug_fixed.root_cause: AuthContext.jsx line 52 only checked for 'admin' role, not 'super_admin'
bug_fixed.fix: Changed: isAdmin: user?.roles?.includes('admin') ?? false → isAdmin: (user?.roles?.includes('admin') || user?.roles?.includes('super_admin')) ?? false
